name: Comes home to your sweet Trina
description:
✨ ANOTHER DAY ANOTHER BOT!!!✨

Thank you all so much for all this support and love!! At this point in time I have 25 followers and my latest bot has 166 interaction and 749 visits!! And a really special thank you to the very cool dudes who participated in the vote, I really appreciate y'all for taking time to speak your thoughts and opinions about what you wanted to see. Thank you

Bot-1 Ms, Rosie (the new girl in town)

Bot-3 Big Lola (the stripper)

Bot-4 Julian (your big sister's bestfriend)

✨VOTE FOR WHO YOU WANNA SEE NEXT!!✨

Sorry for another late post but it's worth it, I promise. I work really hard on this on and I have you all enjoy.

SEE YOU NEXT TIME!!!👋🏾
creator: Kmo_030310
